title: Executive Order 8479—Transferring Certain Lands From the Secretary of Agriculture to the Secretary of the Interior and Reserving Them as a Part of the Necedah National Wildlife Refuge

flags.justification: A narrow, technical land transfer of approximately one acre under existing statutory authority.
A clear, specific transfer made upon the recommendation of the transferring agency itself (the Secretary of Agriculture).
A land-status action creating no compliance regime.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A permanent land reservation, not a temporary-authority grant.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
An extremely narrow, tiny-scale (approximately one acre) land transfer.
A deliberate, cooperative transfer made upon the source agency's own recommendation, not an involuntary or conflicting reassignment.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.
